error.signature: Arrow IPC read fails — endianness mismatch between writer and reader

verdict.summary: Arrow IPC files written on big-endian systems cannot be read on little-endian.

dead_ends.action: Force little-endian byte order in application code
dead_ends.why_fails: Arrow IPC uses native endianness; application-level byte swapping does not affect IPC format

dead_ends.action: Use Arrow Flight instead of IPC files
dead_ends.why_fails: Arrow Flight also uses native endianness

workarounds.action: Standardize on little-endian and convert during write on BE systems
workarounds.how: Most modern systems are little-endian; convert at write time on BE

workarounds.action: Use Parquet format instead of IPC for cross-platform exchange
workarounds.how: Parquet has defined endianness (little-endian); portable across all architectures
